mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly lifting equity valuations over the subsequent month. This effect persists as long as the rate remains below its prior cycle peak.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor demand and impending earnings revisions downward. When the monthly UNRATE rises by more than 0.2 percentage points over a 3-month window, equity markets price in recession risk, depressing forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment spike, or the predictive Rank IC exceeds 0.05 in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between housing starts and industrial production indicates a structural shift in economic momentum. When HOUST declines while INDPRO rises, it signals that growth is becoming overly reliant on business investment rather than broad consumer demand, which historically precedes equity drawdowns.
failure_condition: The interaction term shows no statistical significance (p > 0.10) in predicting 20-day forward returns, or the signal generates a negative Sharpe ratio over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Contraction in industrial production reflects supply-side bottlenecks and weakening capacity utilization. A sustained drop in INDPRO below its 6-month moving average reduces corporate profit margins and equity valuations over the following quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive or neutral when INDPRO breaches the moving average threshold, or the signal's information coefficient drops below 0.02 across multiple economic cycles.

mechanism_narrative: Rising real consumer spending, proxied by retail sales and housing activity, drives corporate revenue growth. An upward trend in RSAFS and HOUST consistently supports positive equity returns over the next week as earnings expectations are revised higher.
failure_condition: The combined signal fails to outperform a buy-and-hold benchmark by at least 50 basis points per month over a 2-year period, or the correlation with forward returns falls below 0.15.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating inflation erodes real yields and forces the Federal Reserve to maintain restrictive policy. When CPIAUCSL increases by more than 0.3% month-over-month for two consecutive months, equity markets discount future cash flows at higher rates, suppressing returns over the next quarter.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL rises > 0.3% MoM for 2 consecutive months
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive despite sustained inflation acceleration, or the predictive power of the inflation trigger vanishes when controlling for FEDFUNDS changes.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous strength in employment growth and wage pressure indicates a tight labor market that supports consumer spending but risks triggering aggressive monetary tightening. The joint rise in PAYEMS and CPIAUCSL creates a policy dilemma that typically weighs on equity valuations.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS rises > 150k and CPIAUCSL rises > 0.2% MoM
failure_condition: The interaction signal produces a positive Rank IC in out-of-sample testing, or forward returns do not significantly differ from the baseline distribution when the trigger activates.

mechanism_narrative: Growth in real GDP relative to industrial output indicates a shift toward services and intangible investment, which historically supports higher equity multiples. When GDPC1 growth exceeds INDPRO growth by more than 1 percentage point, equity markets price in higher profitability and forward returns rise.
failure_condition: The spread between GDP and industrial production growth shows no predictive power for quarterly equity returns, or the signal generates a negative information ratio over a 3-year rolling window.
